Peek season around the first or second week of June. Watch out for thorns! These briars can draw blood. Look for clusters of low-growing bushes (1-3 feet high) along the sandy dirt roads of the Grassy Lakes Estates neighborhood (off of County Road 346A). Falli

Property is owned by Straughn Farms (the producer of nearly one third of Florida's blueberries). Public picking (free of charge!) is usually permitted towards the middle/end of July, after the completion of the commercial harvest. 13000 SW 121st AveArcher, FL
